name: Lemon Roast Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash the chicken and pat it dry. Season with salt and pepper.
2 Sprinkle half of the oregano and minced garlic inside the cavity.
3 Melt butter in a large frying pan until it melts.
4 Brown the chicken on all sides, making sure to coat each side evenly.
5 Transfer the chicken to a crock pot.
6 Sprinkle the remaining oregano and garlic over the chicken.
7 Add water from the frying pan to loosen any brown bits. Pour this mixture into the crock pot.
8 Cover the crock pot and cook on LOW for 8 hours.
9 Just before the cooking time is up, add the lemon juice.
10 Carefully transfer the chicken to a cutting board and let it rest.
11 Skim off any excess fat from the surface of the juices.
12 Pour the lemon juice into a sauce bowl.
13 Carve the bird and serve with some juice spooned over the chicken.
